ab: panqaquanay mu ikuwing nanak.
ralu’ mu ga Baay na Payan, magalpu a kaal mu ka hani.
ch: B:我叫 Baay na Payan，我今年10歲。
en: My name is Baay na Payan, and I’m 10 years old.

ab: nanuwan ku ralu’ su’?
Baay na Payan ku ralu’ mu.
en: My name is Baay na Payan.

ab: ulaqi’ su’ na Itaal na nanuwan?
en: What ethnic group are you from?

ab: ulaqi’ kuwing na Itaal.
Itaal kahabaag ku itaal i imuwag su’ qu?
ch: A:你的家人都是原住民嗎?
en: Are all your family members indigenous?

ab: uwal ga, Itaal cami kahabaag ka qutux cu imuwag.
ch: B:是的，我們全家都是泰雅族人。
en: Yes, my whole family is Atayal.

ab: Itaal kahabaag ku itaal i imuwag su’ qu?
ch: A:你的家人都是原住民嗎?
en: Are all your family members indigenous?

ab: iqaat, Itaal i yaba’ mu, Tu’iya’ i yaya’ mu.
ch: B:不是，我的爸爸是泰雅族，我的媽媽是漢人。
en: No, my father is Atayal, and my mother is Han Taiwanese.

ab: ulaqi’ su’ ni ima’?
ulaqi’ kuwing ni Payan na Buyung.
ch: B:我是 Payan na Buyung 的小孩。
en: I am Payan na Buyung’s child.

ab: haca ku yaba’ su’ qu? piya’ a kaal niya’ la?
ch: A:那位是你爸爸嗎? 他幾歲了?
en: Is that your father? How old is he?

ab: mamatuu’ kinamlapgan a kaal niya’ la.
haca ku yaba’ su’ qu? piya’ a kaal niya’ la?
ch: A:那位是你爸爸嗎? 他幾歲了?
en: Is that your father? How old is he?

ab: iqaat, nabakis na tinqalangan niyam i hiya’, mamaspat kinamlapgan a kaal niya’ la.
ch: B:不是，他是我們部落的耆老，他80歲了。
en: No, he is an elder of our tribe. He is 80 years old.

ab: piya’ a kaal ni qumisuwan na mamaliku su’ la?
magalpu cu mamaspat kaal ni qumisuwan na mamaliku mu la.
payux a kaal kin rahuwal ni isu’ i qumisuwan na mamaliku su’ qu?
ch: A:你哥哥年紀比你大很多嗎?
en: Is your brother much older than you?

ab: imagal cu kaal a inuwaw niyam.
piya’ ku kin ibabawiqan su’?
kabhul cu masupatul kungfn ku kin ibabaweq mu.
ingasug ta’ ini’ pakitaal la, ini’ su’ ka manrakiyas laga?
ch: A:好久不見，你是不是長高了?
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. Have you grown taller?

ab: uwal ga, kabhul cu matuul kungfn kuwing la.
ini’ su’ ka kithu laga?
ini’, tumnauqu su’ i mitaal la.
mahikang su’ la qu?
ini’, kithu kuwing la.
kithu su’ la qu?
uwal, matuul tintin kuwing ka hani la.
